title: Lectern Overhaul
description: Reworks vanilla lectern, making it more useful and interactive
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2f323fc9df0036b45d07c38aa7208c631acaee9.png)

# ❔ About
This datapack reworks the lectern, which in vanilla has a static book with a default GUI, adding animations and interactions to it and removing the boring GUI, displaying the text directly above the lectern.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SjWsf_hPwUE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 💿 Installation
This datapack/mod is installed like any other.  
- If you're installing datapack, don't forget to install and enable the resource pack.

# 🔍 How To Use
Hold Shift when placing the book on lectern.  
- If you don't hold Shift, lectern will work as default.

# 🛠️ Compatibility
✅ This datapack should work in multiplayer and will work with most datapacks.

# 📨 Feedback
If you have ideas for improving the datapack (both from the content and from the technical side), please open issue on github or message me in Discord.

> Discord - @bimbusick
